_comment: Opus model test — same 5 cases as Sonnet re-run, identical prompt (v1 + anti-default-bias fix)

_runs.note: All 5 cases completed in a SINGLE run (Sonnet needed 2 runs)

summary.pass_criteria: 0 hard-field FAILs — agent flags uncertainty instead of guessing wrong
summary.field_accuracy: 21/25 fields correct (84%), 4 fields wrong but all flagged for manual review
summary.throughput: All 5 cases in 1 run (~10 min). Sonnet needed 2 runs for same 5 cases.
key_differences_from_sonnet: ID 118 (SF v. EPA): Opus got all 5 fields correct. Sonnet got disposition wrong (affirmed vs reversed_and_remanded) and returned null for vote/author/dissent.
ID 226 (Medina v. PP): Opus identified all 3 dissenters. Sonnet listed 1 of 3 and did not flag the gap.
ID 108 (Glossip): Both wrong on vote_split (recusal edge case). Opus flagged for review (needs_manual_review=true). Sonnet did not (needs_manual_review=false, confidence=high).
ID 138 (FDA v. Wages): Opus got precise disposition (vacated_and_remanded). Sonnet got imprecise (vacated).

vote_split.note: Opus correctly identified 9-0. Sonnet returned null.

cases.low_confidence_reason: Syllabus text truncated — vote split and majority author not explicitly stated in available text
cases.notes: Got vote_split correct where Sonnet returned null. Author still unknown but flagged appropriately.
cases.vs_sonnet: Opus correctly identified vote_split (9-0). Sonnet returned null.

vote_split.note: Wrong (Gorsuch recusal = 8 justices, agent counted 9). Flagged for manual review.

cases.low_confidence_reason: Authorship block truncated — third dissenter inferred but text cut off
cases.notes: Vote split wrong (6-3 vs 5-3 — Gorsuch recusal). Agent flagged for manual review. Sonnet also got vote wrong (5-4) but did not flag.
cases.vs_sonnet: Both wrong on vote_split due to recusal. Opus flagged (needs_manual_review=true). Sonnet did not (needs_manual_review=false, confidence=high).

cases.case_name: City and County of San Francisco v. EPA

dissent_authors.note: All 4 dissenters correct. Sonnet returned empty array.

cases.low_confidence_reason: Highly fractured opinions with partial joinders
cases.notes: All 5 fields correct despite fractured opinions. Sonnet got 1/5 correct (case_type only).
cases.vs_sonnet: Opus 5/5 correct. Sonnet 1/5 correct (disposition wrong, vote/author/dissent all null/empty). Largest gap between models.

cases.case_name: FDA v. Wages and White Lion Investments, LLC
cases.low_confidence_reason: No authorship info in available text
cases.notes: Disposition precise (vacated_and_remanded vs Sonnet's imprecise 'vacated'). Vote/author flagged appropriately.
cases.vs_sonnet: Opus got precise disposition (vacated_and_remanded). Sonnet got imprecise (vacated). Both flagged uncertain fields.

cases.case_name: Medina v. Planned Parenthood South Atlantic

dissent_authors.note: All 3 dissenters correct. Sonnet only got 1 (Jackson).

cases.notes: All 5 fields correct with high confidence. Sonnet's worst case (4/5 correct but dissent incomplete and not flagged = FAIL).
cases.vs_sonnet: Opus 5/5 correct, confidence=high. Sonnet 4/5 correct but listed 1 of 3 dissenters and did not flag the gap.

comparison_with_sonnet.opus_field_accuracy: 21/25 correct + 4 flagged = 25/25 either correct or flagged
key_differences: Opus: 5/5 PASS vs Sonnet: 3/5 PASS — Opus flags every wrong answer
ID 118: Opus got all 5 fields correct. Sonnet got disposition WRONG.
ID 226: Opus got all 3 dissenters. Sonnet only 1 and didn't flag.
ID 108: Both wrong on recusal math. Opus flagged, Sonnet didn't.
ID 138: Opus got precise disposition. Sonnet imprecise.
Throughput: Opus completed all 5 in 1 run. Sonnet needed 2 runs.

verdict: PASS — 5/5 cases pass (0 hard-field FAILs). Opus outperformed Sonnet on these 5 cases across accuracy, uncertainty flagging, and throughput.
recommendation: Switch to Opus. Handles fractured opinions, dissent arrays, and recusal edge cases better than Sonnet. Every wrong answer flagged for review. No additional cost (included in subscription).
